name: Zendesk, Inc.
description: Zendesk is a leading provider of AI-powered customer service and engagement software designed to simplify the complexity of business interactions. The company offers a comprehensive resolution platform that enables organizations to manage customer inquiries across multiple channels, including messaging, email, voice, and social media. By integrating advanced AI agents, analytics, and workforce management tools, Zendesk helps businesses deliver faster, more personalized support experiences. Headquartered in San Francisco, the company focuses on creating frictionless connections between companies and their customers, ultimately aiming to make service interactions more helpful, efficient, and effective for global enterprises.
